query:
INSERT INTO guild_script_derived (script_id, guild_id, source_hash, settings_hash, runtime_version, contributes_commands, contributes_interval_timers, settings_definitions, updated_at)
                    VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, now())
                    ON CONFLICT (script_id) DO UPDATE SET
                    source_hash = $3,
                    settings_hash = $4,
                    runtime_version = $5,
                    contributes_commands = $6,
                    contributes_interval_timers = $7,
                    settings_definitions = $8,
                    updated_at = now();
